summary.source_of_truth: derived from src/state.js ALL_SOURCES + WD_PHASE_H + insposearch/sources/ manifests
notes: top_level_source = one adapter function dispatched at search time
subsource = institution/provider/contributor reached *through* a source; e.g. Europeana federates ~4,260 providers
zero_key_baseline = sources reachable without any user-provided API key
full_key_maximum = sources reachable when every free/paid key has been entered
subsource_count.kind: live (derivable from an API count endpoint we can poll nightly) | static (fixed enumerable list) | none (single-origin)
adapters marked without_adapter have a SOURCE_META entry but no fetcher function in fetchers.js — either disabled, deprecated, or pending implementation
subsource-proxies (euro_*/dpla_*/si_*) set to 0 in subsource_count to avoid double-counting — they're already included in the parent aggregator's federated-institution count.

wiring_evidence.method: source is 'wired' if: (a) appears in trackSource('id') or callIfHealthy('id') in app.js, OR (b) appears as key in a dispatch map like '{ id: (kw,lim,sig,pg) => fetchX(...) }', OR (c) is a manifest-driven entry in insposearch/sources/, OR (d) is in WD_PHASE_H (shared runner), OR (e) is a euro_*/dpla_*/si_* subproxy (dispatched via ADAPTERS map)

subsource_count.method: DDB public institutions page displays exact count
ALA collectory dataProvider web service array length
Trove public figure; live endpoint requires API key
EOL public talking point; live endpoint 403
Finna publicly quoted figure; endpoint returned 404/403 to auto-fetch
Images_by_source meta-category subcategory count (mixes source types)
counted live Flickr Commons institutions page
28 hubs (12 service + 16 content) per Wikipedia, ~16 additional partners; DPLA API key required for live count
Smithsonian official: 21 museums including the National Zoo
14 core BHL consortium members (Wikipedia); regional affiliates add more
Paris Musées official network of 14 City of Paris museums
